name: Snapper Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat from one snapper turtle into small pieces.
2. Break the veal knuckles into 2-inch pieces and place them in a roasting pan with the chicken fat (or butter), onions, celery, carrots, thyme, marjoram, cloves, bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
3. Bake at 400°F until the meat is browned.
4. Remove from oven and stir in flour; cook for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Pour the browned mixture into a large soup kettle and add broth (3 quarts or 4 quarts) and tomatoes.
6. Cook slowly for 3-1/2 hours.
7. Combine the snapper meat with 1 cup sherry, some salt, Tabasco sauce, and lemon slices; simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Strain the soup and combine it with the other mixture.
9. Add the chopped egg and remaining sherry. Serve immediately.
